ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the hospital */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of beds */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds */,
  "non_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of non-ICU beds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient (e.g., critical, serious, easy) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest COVID-19 test result */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the latest COVID-19 test */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "professional_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare professional (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the professional works */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the healthcare professional */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the healthcare professional */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the professional works */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_professionals_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly, custom) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the healthcare professional who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report if stored as a file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)
column_names: Status of the patient (e.g., critical, serious, easy)
Date of the latest COVID-19 test result
Result of the latest COVID-19 test
Unique identifier for each healthcare professional
Full name of the healthcare professional
Role of the healthcare professional (e.g., doctor, nurse)
ID of the hospital where the professional works
Contact information of the healthcare professional
Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly, custom)
Unique identifier for the healthcare professional who generated the report
File path of the report if stored as a file
